description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are painted a light pastel color, and large windows line several sides, allowing for ample natural light. A spacious backyard features a swimming pool enclosed by a transparent fence, and there are three mature trees positioned around the property, providing shade and greenery. The front of the bungalow includes a driveway leading to a garage, and a small patio area is visible near the entrance. The roofline is flat and minimalist, with some sections featuring pergola-style slats for partial shade. The property is set on a neatly manicured lawn, emphasizing its suburban residential character.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a backyard pool, and a garage, set on a manicured lawn with surrounding trees.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the bungalow with the main entrance, garage, and a clear view of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the pool area enclosed by a transparent fence and the side facade with large windows.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the garage, the back entrance, and the pool area, with more of the lawn and trees visible.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the opposite side of the bungalow, showing the flat roof, side windows, and the arrangement of the patio and lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple sides
